headerNav.journeys_of_points: How can you benefit as an app user

hero.title: Naxab
hero.tagline_location: In Egypt, Saudi Arabia, and the Arab world
hero.features_list: Promotional offers – Discount coupons – Lucky wheel gifts – Cashback points – Loyalty rewards

sellers.text1: That enables your customers to benefit from the offers and discounts that you offer and convert them into points and rewards that you give them to enhance their loyalty to your brand

customers.text1: That enables you to take advantage of offers and discounts offered by stores and brands

contact_us.name: Name
contact_us.phone_invalid: Please enter a valid phone number
contact_us.message_invalid: This field is required and must be at least 5 characters long

points_seller_description_1: The cashback points are the points that will be given to the customer and earned in his wallet through the discount percentage specified on the invoice, and this percentage is calculated from the total value of the invoice for his purchases.
points_seller_description_2: They're the points that the customer will collect from every purchase he makes through his purchase invoice, and these points are equal to the total value of the invoice, and they are accumulated until the customer reaches the loyalty limit required of him and obtains the loyalty reward after that.
points_customer_description_1: Download the app and discover the best stores and brands around you
points_customer_description_2: Browse the strongest offers and discounts from those brands, and get coupons to benefit from them
points_customer_description_3: Spin the lucky wheel and enjoy playing it to win many gifts
points_customer_description_4: Collect cashback points in your wallet, or loyalty points through your purchase invoice
points_customer_description_5: Go to the store to benefit from coupons, redeem cashback points, and receive gifts and rewards
seller_fact_1: Did you know that your existing customers spend more than 60% more than new customers on their purchases?
seller_fact_2: Did you know that more than 80% say that loyalty applications make them more willing and willing to repeat and repeat business with the same brand?
seller_fact_3: Did you know that the cost of attracting a customer for the first time costs you 5 to 20 times what you spend on maintaining existing customers?
seller_fact_4: Did you know that your existing customers are more than 50% convinced to try a new product of yours and are fully willing to buy and spend much more than new customers?
seller_fact_5: Did you know that offers and discounts attract more than 75% of consumers when choosing a brand and intending to buy?
joining_invetation_seller_text_2: And take the initiative to join the brands, download the application, and have a different and unique experience in the world of points and loyalty applications
seller_feature_1: Perfect design and attractive interface for both the user and the store.
seller_feature_2: Easy and simple control panel to manage your store data, offers, discounts, and gifts provided to your customers, with the ability to modify or stop them at any time.
seller_feature_3: The ability to list more than one branch of your store, define the phone number for each branch, and locate it on the GPS map.
seller_feature_4: The ability to add multiple accounts for your store employees (managers - cashiers).
seller_feature_5: The ability to create and publish more than one promotional offer at the same time, and determine the number of coupons allocated for each offer separately (free service).
seller_feature_6: Setting up and building gift segments and sections for your brand's lucky wheel (paid service).
seller_feature_7: Activating the purchase invoice points system, enabling the customer to add cashback or loyalty points (paid service).
seller_feature_8: It does not require or depend on integration with any other system, whether an accounting program or otherwise.
seller_feature_9: Allowing the customer to track their wallet points within the app, and know the number of earned and valid gifts and rewards they have.
seller_feature_10: Easy mechanism for redeeming points and delivering gifts and rewards to the customer through the QR Code system.
seller_feature_11: A complete and detailed log of all transactions made (points redemption - gift redemption - reward redemption).
seller_feature_12: A record showing the total value of customer purchases, analyzing each customer's behavior, and knowing their purchasing power.
customer_feature_1: Follow the best offers and get coupons
customer_feature_2: Spin the activated lucky wheel and win gifts
customer_feature_3: Track your wallet and points in real time
call_to_action_text: Enjoy a unique and fun experience in the world of discounts, points and rewards
